name: rotki
description: Portfolio tracking, analytics, accounting and tax reporting
compose:
name: slashnode-rotki
services:
  web:
    image: rotki/rotki:v1.43.2
    container_name: rotki
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    init: true
    volumes:
      - web_data-data:/data
      - web_data-logs:/logs
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8084:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-data:
    name: slashnode-rotki_web_data-data
  web_data-logs:
    name: slashnode-rotki_web_data-logs
